_comment: Example user rule set. This file is INERT: names starting with '_' or '.'
are skipped by the loader. Copy it to something like 'my_rules.json' in
this same folder to switch it on.
Every *.json here is loaded and merged ABOVE the active preset. Giving a
rule the same 'rule' id as a preset rule replaces that preset rule, which
is how you retune a built-in instead of competing with it.
rule            unique id; also what the preview shows as the reason
destination     path template under the organized root; placeholders:
priority        higher wins within the user layer (default: 0)
A file with a syntax error is skipped with a warning, not fatal — but it
means none of its rules apply, so check the preview after editing.
